ActionProposal.description: Immutable, policy-enforced action proposal shown to a reviewer.
ActionProposal.title: ActionProposal

ActionProposalInput.description: Untrusted model recommendation awaiting deterministic policy enforcement.
ActionProposalInput.title: ActionProposalInput

ActionResult.description: Result of deterministic exactly-once synthetic action execution.
ActionResult.title: ActionResult

ApprovalDecision.description: Persisted human decision bound to an exact proposal hash.
ApprovalDecision.title: ApprovalDecision

ApprovalRequest.description: Reviewer-facing approval state for a persisted proposal.
ApprovalRequest.title: ApprovalRequest

AttachmentMetadata.description: Metadata for a private, previously authorized attachment.
AttachmentMetadata.title: AttachmentMetadata

CaseClassification.description: Validated structured output from case classification.
CaseClassification.title: CaseClassification

DuplicateChargeValidation.description: Code-calculated duplicate-charge finding; no model arithmetic is accepted.
DuplicateChargeValidation.title: DuplicateChargeValidation

EvidenceBundle.description: Verified evidence and deterministic completeness metadata.
EvidenceBundle.title: EvidenceBundle

EvidenceClaim.description: Untrusted factual claim tied to exact evidence returned by tools.
EvidenceClaim.title: EvidenceClaim

EvidenceItem.description: A single factual observation returned by an allowlisted source.
EvidenceItem.title: EvidenceItem

EvidenceVerification.description: Deterministic, public-safe result of checking evidence and citations.
EvidenceVerification.title: EvidenceVerification

FinalResponse.description: Validated customer draft and internal note without hidden reasoning.
FinalResponse.title: FinalResponse

InternalTraceIdentifiers.description: Private correlation identifiers included only in authenticated reports.
InternalTraceIdentifiers.title: InternalTraceIdentifiers

PolicyDecision.description: Sanitized deterministic policy result, never an executable proposal.
PolicyDecision.title: PolicyDecision

ReadToolName.description: Tools the model may request during bounded evidence collection.
ReadToolName.title: ReadToolName

RequestedToolCall.description: A bounded request for one additional evidence lookup.
RequestedToolCall.title: RequestedToolCall

ResolutionProposal.description: Evidence-cited model recommendation, not an authorization to act.
ResolutionProposal.title: ResolutionProposal

RunArtifact.description: Reference to a private report object; no storage credentials are exposed.
RunArtifact.title: RunArtifact

RunError.description: Safe terminal or recoverable workflow error.
RunError.title: RunError

SourceSystem.description: Allowlisted systems that may contribute workflow evidence.
SourceSystem.title: SourceSystem

TicketInput.description: Normalized synthetic support ticket supplied to a workflow run.
TicketInput.title: TicketInput

ToolResult.description: Standard envelope returned by every typed tool adapter.
ToolResult.title: ToolResult

WorkflowEvent.description: Append-only event payload safe to expose to the product UI.
WorkflowEvent.title: WorkflowEvent

WorkflowRun.description: Public workflow run state without checkpoint or hidden reasoning data.
WorkflowRun.title: WorkflowRun

info.description: Generated from Pydantic v2 models; do not edit by hand.
